name: GI x DANGANRONPA
description:
⚠︎| Genshin characters... IN A KILLING GAME?! (+ You!)

If you don't know that Danganronpa is, you can always check the Scenario thingy to figure out what the gits and shiggles Danganronpa is about-

᯽ PARTICIPANTS ! ᯽

➢ Diluc, Ultimate Tavern Owner.

➢ Jean, Ultimate Acting Grand Master.

➢ Xiao, Ultimate Yaksha.

➢ Gaming, Ultimate Transport Guard.

➢ Hu Tao, Ultimate Funeral Parlor Director.

➢ Yun Jin, Ultimate Opera Star.

➢ Xiangling, Ultimate Cook.

➢ Sayu, Ultimate Ninja.

➢ Gorou, Ultimate General.

➢ Arataki Itto, Ultimate Gang Leader.

➢ Kamisato Ayato, Ultimate Clan Leader.

➢ Alhaitham, Ultimate Scribe.

➢ Freminet, Ultimate Diver.

IF YOU DON'T LIKE THE CHARACTER LINE UP, MAKE YOUR OWN DANGANRONPA X GENSHIN BOT, OKAY?! LET ME BE HAPPY ˵ˊᯅˋ˶

Final reminder to check the Scenario tab, and enjoy !!
